verses:
gṛhastha⋅vairāgī⋅duhe bale gorārāya
dekha bhāi! nāma vinā jena dina nāhi jāya

bahu aṅga⋅sādhane bhāi nāhi prayojana
kṛṣṇa⋅nāmāśraye śuddha karaha jīvana

baddha⋅jīve kṛpā kari’ kṛṣṇa haila ‘nāma’
kali⋅jīve dayā kari’, kṛṣṇa haila gaura⋅dhāma

ekānta sarala⋅bhāve bhaja gaura⋅jana
tabe ta’ pāibe bhāi śrī⋅kṛṣṇa⋅caraṇa

gaura⋅jana⋅saṅga kara ‘gaurāṅga’ baliyā
‘hare kṛṣṇa’ nāma bala nāciyā nāciyā

acire pāibe bhāi nāma⋅prema⋅dhana
jāhā vilāite prabhura nade āgamana
en_translation:
Lord Gorārāya says to both the householder and the renunciate: "See, O brother! Let not a single day pass without the Holy Name."

"O brother, there is no need for many elaborate spiritual practices. Make your life pure by taking shelter of the Holy Name of Kṛṣṇa."

"Showing mercy to the conditioned souls, Lord Kṛṣṇa became the Holy Name. Showing compassion to the souls of Kali-yuga, Lord Kṛṣṇa became the abode of Gaura."

"Exclusively worship the followers of Lord Caitanya with a simple heart. Then, O brother, you will certainly attain the lotus feet of Śrī Kṛṣṇa."

"Associate with the followers of Lord Caitanya, chanting 'Gaurāṅga', and enthusiastically chant the 'Hare Kṛṣṇa' name while dancing."

"Very soon, O brother, you will attain the treasure of love for the Holy Name, which the Lord came to Nadīyā to distribute."
